data_out.description: Workflow execution report documenting pass/fail status, build artifacts, and execution logs

domain_knowledge: GitHub Actions workflows are automated CI/CD pipelines triggered on repository events; the dev_build_release.yml workflow orchestrates mzmine build, test, and release artifact generation.
JDK 25 and JavaFX 24 are runtime and UI framework dependencies; build success requires both to be properly installed and linked during the Java compilation and packaging phases.
Build artifacts in GitHub Actions are ephemeral storage outputs (e.g., JAR files, installers, release packages) that must be retrieved or recorded before workflow expiry (typically 90 days).
Workflow run logs include console output from each job step; pass/fail status is determined by exit codes and assertion checks configured in the YAML workflow definition.

direct_checks: verify that GitHub Actions workflow file dev_build_release.yml exists at https://github.com/mzmine/mzmine/blob/main/.github/workflows/dev_build_release.yml

retrieve the most recent completed run of dev_build_release.yml workflow from https://github.com/mzmine/mzmine/actions/workflows/dev_build_release.yml and record its conclusion status (success, failure, cancelled, or skipped)
extract and list all artifact names and download URLs from the most recent dev_build_release.yml run, if any artifacts were produced
verify file_exists for each recorded build artifact by attempting to access its download URL and confirming HTTP 200 response
expert_review: assess whether build artifacts (if present) match expected outputs for a mass spectrometry data processing tool built with JDK 25 and JavaFX 24
judge whether the workflow conclusion and artifact availability are consistent with a stable or release-candidate state of the mzmine repository

evidence_snippets.text: [intro] Does the dev_build_release.yml GitHub Actions workflow for the mzmine/mzmine repository complete successfully and produce build artifacts?: '[![Development Build Release](https://github.com/mzmine/mzmine/actions/workflows/dev_build_release.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/mzmine/mzmine/actions/workflows/dev_build_release.yml)'

[intro] A development build release workflow is configured and accessible at the mzmine/mzmine repository GitHub Actions, as indicated by the presence of the dev_build_release.yml workflow badge linking to the workflow runs.: '[![Development Build Release](https://github.com/mzmine/mzmine/actions/workflows/dev_build_release.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/mzmine/mzmine/actions/workflows/dev_build_release.yml)'
[other] Workflow execution report documenting pass/fail status, build artifacts, and execution logs: 'dev_build_release.yml GitHub Actions workflow'
[intro] mzmine: 'mzmine is an open-source software for mass spectrometry data processing'
[discussion] No changelog documenting workflow history, modifications, or versioning scheme for dev_build_release.yml: '_No changelog found._'

cmd:
curl -s -H 'Accept: application/vnd.github+json' 'https://api.github.com/repos/mzmine/mzmine/actions/workflows/dev_build_release.yml/runs?per_page=1' | jq -r '.workflow_runs[0] | "Status: \(.status)
Conclusion: \(.conclusion)
ID: \(.id)
Created: \(.created_at)
Artifacts URL: https://github.com/mzmine/mzmine/actions/runs/\(.id)"' > workflow_report.txt && cat workflow_report.txt
executable.grounding_notes: Unverified by the executable guard — command runs inline code (-c/-e); its API calls cannot be validated against package files. Treat this command as a best-effort inference; verify the entry point and APIs against the real code before running.

methodology_summary: Access the GitHub Actions workflow endpoint for dev_build_release.yml in the mzmine/mzmine repository.
Retrieve the most recent workflow run record, including status (success/failure), execution timestamp, and job logs.
Extract and document build artifacts generated by the workflow (compiled binaries, installers, or packages).
Record any error messages, warnings, or dependency issues from the build and test phases.
Validation: confirm that workflow status (pass/fail) is unambiguously recorded and all listed artifacts are retrievable or their URLs are documented.

task_objective: Query the dev_build_release.yml GitHub Actions workflow run status and document the most recent build's pass/fail outcome and artifact outputs.

workflow_description: 1. Access the GitHub Actions workflow page at https://github.com/mzmine/mzmine/actions/workflows/dev_build_release.yml. 2. Retrieve the most recent workflow run status and execution logs. 3. Document the pass/fail outcome and any build artifacts or error messages produced. 4. Record results in a structured report file with timestamp, workflow status, and artifact links.
